## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `uv run pytest -q`
- [ ] `uv run python -m py_compile src/youtube_downloader/cli.py`
- [ ] Updated docs/tests where needed

## Checklist

- [ ] No machine-specific/private paths introduced
- [ ] No secrets introduced
- [ ] Backward-compatible CLI behavior (or clearly documented breaking change)

Link issues here (e.g. `Closes #123`).
